notes: admin (guild operator) !mineworld 12345 drives mining.reseed_world -> record_reseed_world: set_world_seed upserts the mining_world row (seed 12345) and replies with the shipped reseed copy — the first row-bearing reseed capture (retires the mining_world guard-only-capture exemption; mining_cog.py mineworld copy verbatim)

payload.content: 🌐 Reseeded this server's mining world to **12345**. The whole grid regenerated; your position and explored map carry over.
